text: Welcome to the community, @mentor_lina! You’ve been approved as a mentor. We’re glad to have you here — please review the mentoring expectations and community guidelines before jumping in.

Welcome to the community, @helper_alex! You’ve been approved as a moderator. Please take a moment to review the community guidelines and moderator handbook, and thanks for helping keep the space healthy.
Welcome to the community, @guide_sam! You’ve been approved as an event helper. Glad to have you on board — please check the event coordination notes and community guidelines when you get a chance.
